TEXT MESSAGE TEMPLATE

Hey,

I want to invite you to join Men4Choice on April 30th at the home of Joe Falk for Miami4Choice 2026! There’s a cocktail hour before. You can buy your ticket here:  https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miami4choice

  • 80% of internet activity is in private group chats; use them.
  1. Fellow community leaders and elected officials
  2. Anyone in the movement

Thank you for helping share this in your communities.
